build.beforeDevCommand: cargo build -p backend && npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: cargo build -p backend --release && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:*; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; frame-src 'none'
